whatWeBuy.heading: What We
whatWeBuy.subtext: We buy all types of scrap metal, old electronics, and machinery. Here are our main services in Riyadh.

ac.title: AC Scrap Buying
ac.description: We buy all kinds of old, damaged, or non-working air conditioners (split, window, central) at the best rates in Riyadh.

brass.title: Brass Scrap Buying
brass.description: Sell your old brass ornaments, plumbing fixtures, valves, and industrial brass scraps. We pay premium cash prices.

aluminum.title: Aluminum Scrap Buying
aluminum.description: We accept aluminum window frames, sheet aluminum, engine parts, cans, and alloy wheels with quick on-site evaluation.

cable.title: Cable & Wire Scrap
cable.description: Best prices for copper cables, insulated wires, aluminum wiring, and electrical cables from demolitions and renovations.

computer.title: Computer Scrap Buying
computer.description: We buy obsolete computer components, motherboards, old servers, laptops, and general electronic scrap for recycling.

copper.title: Copper Scrap Buying
copper.description: Get top value for copper pipes, tubing, copper wire, radiator cores, and electric motors. Instant weight checks.

electrical.title: Electrical Scrap Buying
electrical.description: We buy transformers, switchboards, generators, panels, breakers, and assorted electrical waste from projects.

machinery.title: Machinery Scrap Buying
machinery.description: Sell your old industrial manufacturing machinery, generators, factory scrap, and heavy equipment. We handle dismantling.

whyChooseUs.subtext: We pride ourselves on providing the most reliable, clean, and fast scrap collection services in Riyadh. Our team handles everything from dismantling to loading, leaving you with zero hassle and instant cash in hand.

cards.review: Had a large amount of leftover copper cables and aluminum frames from a renovation project. Riyadh Scrap Buyer offered the best pricing and came the same day to collect.

cards.name: Ahmed Mansour
cards.review: Very professional and honest weights. I sold old industrial machinery scrap from our warehouse. Their dismantling crew was quick and safe.

aboutUs.heading: About Us
aboutUs.paragraph1: Riyadh Scrap Buyer is a premier scrap purchasing and recycling company operating across all neighborhoods of Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. With over a decade of experience, we have established ourselves as the most trusted partner for residential, commercial, and industrial scrap sellers.
aboutUs.paragraph2: We specialize in buying old air conditioners, copper cables, aluminum fixtures, brass machinery, old computers, and demolition scrap. Our mission is to promote eco-friendly metal recycling while offering our clients competitive market prices and seamless, professional collection services.

howItWorks.heading: How It
howItWorks.subtext: Sell your scrap in 4 simple and quick steps without leaving your premises.

steps.title: Call or WhatsApp
steps.description: Send us photos of your scrap metal or old appliances via WhatsApp or call us directly to get an instant preliminary estimate.

steps.title: On-Site Evaluation
steps.description: Our evaluation team visits your location in Riyadh to inspect the scrap and offer a fair, weight-based market quote.

steps.title: Dismantling & Loading
steps.description: Our professional workers safely dismantle heavy items (like central AC units or machinery) and load them into our trucks.

steps.title: Instant Payment
steps.description: Once loading is complete, we make immediate cash payment on the spot. No delays, no hidden deductions.

faq.heading: Your Questions
faq.subtext: Frequently asked questions about selling scrap, pricing, and pickup services in Riyadh.

items.question: Do you provide free scrap pickup services in Riyadh?
items.answer: Yes! We provide complete free pickup services throughout all areas of Riyadh for reasonable volumes. Our team handles loading and transportation.

items.question: What types of scrap materials do you buy?
items.answer: We buy all kinds of metal scrap including copper cables/wires, AC units (split & window), aluminum windows/frames, brass valves, old computers/servers, generators, industrial machinery, and electrical panels.

items.question: How is the price of my scrap calculated?
items.answer: Prices are calculated based on the scrap type, weight, purity, and current international and local market recycling rates. We use accurate weighing scales on site to ensure fair pricing.

items.question: Do you pay cash on the spot?
items.answer: Yes, we pay cash immediately upon loading the scrap into our trucks. You do not have to wait for bank transfers or processing delays.

items.question: Can I sell old office and electronics scrap in bulk?
items.answer: Yes, we purchase large quantities of commercial and office scrap, including computers, servers, UPS systems, networking equipment, and office metal furniture.

items.question: Do you handle demolition scrap and dismantling?
items.answer: Absolutely. We have a skilled dismantling team that can safely dismantle heavy factory machinery, central cooling plants, steel structures, and electrical units from buildings.
